cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
project("hodlr")

set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake")
set(COMMON_LIBS "")


# ~~ Add Eigen ~~
find_package(Eigen3 REQUIRED)
include_directories(${EIGEN3_INCLUDE_DIR})
#include_directories(SYSTEM "/global/homes/t/tblommel/Libraries/eigen-3.4.0/")
add_compile_definitions(EIGEN_DONT_PARALLELIZE)
#message(${EIGEN3_INCLUDE_DIR})

#find_package(FFTW REQUIRED)

# ~~ Paths and Subdirs ~~
include_directories(${CMAKE_INCLUDE_PATH})
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIR})
#include_directories(${FFTW_INC})
include_directories(${LIBDLR_HEADER})

# ~~ Libraries ~~
#link_directories(${FFTW_DIR})
link_directories(${CMAKE_LIBRARY_PATH})
link_directories(${LINK_DIR})
link_directories(${LIBDLR_LIB})

option(BUILD_TEST "Build test suite" ON)
if(BUILD_TEST)
    add_subdirectory(tests)
endif(BUILD_TEST)

# ~~ Add HDF5 ~~
if (hdf5)
  #find_library(HDF5_LIB hdf5)
  find_package(HDF5 REQUIRED)
#  set(HDF5_LIB ${LIBS} ${HDF5_LIBRARIES})
#  include_directories(${HDF5_INCLUDE_DIR})
#  link_directories(${HDF5_LIBRARIES})
  add_definitions("-DCNTR_USE_HDF5")
  message(STATUS "HDF5 dir: ${HDF5_INCLUDE_DIR}")
  message(STATUS "HDF5 lib: ${HDF5_LIBRARIES}")
  message(STATUS "HDF5 lib: ${LIBS}")
  #fetch HighFive from GitHub
  include(CPM)
  CPMAddPackage(
    NAME HighFive
    GITHUB_REPOSITORY BlueBrain/HighFive
    GIT_TAG master
    OPTIONS
    "HIGHFIVE_USE_BOOST OFF"
    "HIGHFIVE_USE_EIGEN ON"
    "HIGHFIVE_UNIT_TESTS OFF"
    "HIGHFIVE_EXAMPLES OFF"
  )
endif (hdf5)

# ~~ OpenMP and MPI flags ~~
option(omp "Build with OpenMP support" ON)
if (omp)
    message(STATUS "Building with OpenMP")
    find_package(OpenMP REQUIRED)
    add_definitions("-DCNTR_USE_OMP")
    set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${OpenMP_C_FLAGS}")
    set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} ${OpenMP_CXX_FLAGS}")
endif ()

option(mpi "Build with OpenMPI support" OFF)
if (mpi)
    message(STATUS "Building with OpenMPI")
    find_package(MPI REQUIRED)
    add_definitions("-DCNTR_USE_MPI")
    set(CMAKE_C_COMPILE_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_COMPILE_FLAGS} ${MPI_COMPILE_FLAGS}")
    set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILE_FLAGS
        "${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILE_FLAGS} ${MPI_COMPILE_FLAGS}")
    set(CMAKE_C_LINK_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_LINK_FLAGS} ${MPI_LINK_FLAGS}")
    set(CMAKE_CXX_LINK_FLAGS
        "${CMAKE_CXX_LINK_FLAGS} ${MPI_LINK_FLAGS}")
    include_directories(${MPI_INCLUDE_PATH})
    list(APPEND COMMON_LIBS ${MPI_LIBRARIES})
endif ()


add_subdirectory(hodlr)
add_subdirectory(programs)
